title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 29 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 29 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 29 2026
summary:
Main
Today, the DCE iron ore futures trended stronger, with the most-traded contract I2609 closing at 787.5 yuan/mt, up 0.90%from the previous trading session. Spot prices rose 6-7 from the previous day. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm in quoting, while steel mills maintained a strong wait-and-see a􀆫tude with fewer inquiries; overall spot transactions were thin.
